channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside number 20BC there are three bits of graffiti, 2nd July
item.description:
Outside number 20BC there are three bits of graffiti, I've attached a photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castledine Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thoresby street gutters and pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Thoresby street gutters and pavement full of rubbish. Much of it McDonalds next door but also people drop litter out of their parked cars. Please clean!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thoresby Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van driving wrong way up the street, 2nd July
item.description:
Persistent problem please can we have a camera here. And helpful if you can this guy

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches overhanging garden, and close to bedroom window.. tree debris blowing in windows when open and roots growing in our front manhole, 2nd July
item.description:
This tree is causing the above problems, roots in manhole has caused us calling out services when toilet blocks..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle for sale, 2nd July
item.description:
Car for sale on Danson Road, has been there for about 2 months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Vehicles for sale on the public road

item.title: Outside 63 Cricklewood Broadway (in Keyes Road), 2nd July
item.description:
DIY materials dumped by tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keyes Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: General litter, dead branches and overgrown verges, 2nd July
item.description:
The grass verge on the houses side ( not park ) is overgrown, strewn with old dead branches and general litter. Would be a nice to have this path maintained for visitors to the cemetery. thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilldrop Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets with rubbish, 2nd July
item.description:
Pallets have been dumped and then Rubbish accumulated

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cronin Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd July
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for about a week now. The dog poo bag is a new addition last night or today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree behind number 27 parrtridge road needs cutting, 2nd July
item.description:
Theres an alleyway way behind number 27-29 parrtridge road and there is a large tree there that needs cutting back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Partridge Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus using youth hostel has emptied it's toilet waste on Rotherhithe St, 2nd July
item.description:
A bus depositing guests at the youth hostel has vented its toilet waste on the pavement outside Pacific Wharf, residents are complaining of the smell
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, West Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: 4 paving slabs are loose and one is raised by approx 2 inches, 2nd July
item.description:
Raised and lose paving slabs which are a trip hazard outside 135 Willersley AVE DA15
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Willersley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: White Hart Lane recreational ground, 2nd July
item.description:
Car and driveway gate blocking the pavement as shown in my photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): White Hart Lane, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surface problems, 2nd July
item.description:
Stoney section Carlton Road Being made worse by extra traffic using it as diversion to avoid Thames water work. The residents whose properties front this section are responsible for it as it is called a builders road. I have e mailed the longlands ward councillors about this and they have not even responded to me!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive little dumped on corner of Gunton and casimir, 2nd July
item.description:
Excessive little dumped on corner of Gunton and casimir

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Casimir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
